title: MemoryPolicy
description: Declarative per-org memory governance. Configures review cadence, timeout behavior, tentative-weight, approval gating, and per-session caps. Added in schema 1.2.0.

review_cadence_hours.description: How often the governance service sweeps pending tentative memories for this policy's scope.

timeout_action.description: What happens to a tentative memory that sits past its review deadline without explicit action.

review_deadline_hours.description: Hours from tentative-status entry until the timeout_action fires.

tentative_weight.description: Retrieval weight for tentative (unreviewed) memories vs. approved ones. Lower values keep unreviewed memory out of the hot path.

org_scope_requires_approval.description: Org-wide memory writes always go through review, even from high-trust agents.

max_memories_per_session.description: Upper bound on remember() calls per session before the agent is rate-limited.

consolidation_gate.description: Whether consolidation flows through the 4-dimensional Kairos validation gate (logical / factual / novelty / alignment). `none` skips the gate — fast but unsafe.
